roles.evaluator: Scores prediction outcomes and error metrics.
roles.analyst: Judges whether proposed system changes are justified.
roles.risk_manager: Constrains changes when regime or error risk is elevated.
roles.strategy_tuner: Proposes bounded threshold and weighting adjustments.
